title: filago pyramidata subsp. eriocephala
intro: Filago pyramidata subsp. eriocephala, also known as the lesser fleabane, is a plant species in the Asteraceae family characterized by its small, yellowish flowers and hairy leaves. The plant is used in herbal medicine due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of lesser fleabane include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and soothe skin irritations, making it a popular remedy for wounds, burns, and skin conditions such as eczema. Herbal preparations of lesser fleabane can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
